problem_statement: Validate Azure OpenAI inference through an APIM gateway endpoint and evaluate APIM-served responses with Azure AI Evaluation SDK.
hypothesis: A classic Azure OpenAI resource and APIM in the same UK South resource group can expose a stable /chat/completions gateway endpoint for inference and evaluation workflows.
customer_scenario: Platform and app teams testing centralized API gateway governance for Azure OpenAI while preserving notebook-first deployment and test flow.
data_requirements: Synthetic JSONL prompts and expected behavior only. No production data.
security_notes: Prototype only. Uses API key based auth between APIM and Azure OpenAI for simplicity. Do not commit generated env/.env files or keys.
